name: Parameterization of Homomorphic Image Systems
description: HIMSY: the parameterization of homomorphic image systems, constructing Z1 from Z2 and homomorphisms HS, HI, HO.

elements.text: HIMSY = {((Z2, HS, HI, HO), Z1): Z2 ∈ DSYSTEMS; HS, HI, HO are functions with DMN(HS)=SZ2, DMN(HI)=IZ2, DMN(HO)=OZ2; consistency side-conditions on HS, HI, HO; Z1 = (SZ1, IZ1, OZ1, NZ1, RZ1) with SZ1=RNG(HS), IZ1=RNG(HI), OZ1=RNG(HO), NZ1 and RZ1 induced from Z2 via HS, HI, HO}.
NZ1 induced from Z2 via HS, HI, HO and next-state consistency.
RZ1 induced from Z2 via HS, HO and readout consistency.
